_publications._publicationTitle: Unbalancing cAMP and Ras/MAPK pathways as a therapeutic strategy for cutaneous neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: Selumetinib-ogerin cotreatments exhibited a significantly enhanced disaggregation index compared with single agents and controls. Furthermore, by using a life and death staining assay, we observed a significant increase in cell death
details: Selumetinib-ogerin cotreatment significantly enhanced disaggregation index and increased cell death compared to single agents. Selumetinib-PAM71 cotreatment showed similar effects with significant decrease in living cells and viability
